HomePage.name: Hi, I am Mardin
HomePage.about: I am a fullstack web developer
HomePage.intro: Hello, my name is Mardin, a Fullstack Web Developer passionate about building modern, responsive, and scalable web applications. I have hands-on experience working with technologies such as React, Next.js, Node.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and Docker for deployment. Throughout my journey, I have developed interactive frontend features while also managing backend services and databases using Express.js and MySQL. In addition, I have a strong understanding of UI/UX design with tools like Figma, allowing me to bridge technical solutions with great user experiences. Currently, I am pursuing my studies in Information Technology while actively building personal and team-based projects. This portfolio serves as a place to document my journey, skills, and projects I have created. With a strong passion for continuous learning and growth, I am always open to new challenges in the tech industry.

hero.title: About Me
hero.description: Hi, I am Mardin. I build responsive web applications with a focus on clean interfaces, practical backend logic, and consistent user experience.

AboutPage.storyParagraphOne: I enjoy turning ideas into useful web applications. My work usually starts from understanding the interface, shaping a clean user flow, and then connecting it with backend logic that keeps the application reliable.
AboutPage.storyParagraphTwo: This portfolio is a place to document my learning journey, projects, and the technologies I use while growing as a fullstack web developer.

timeline.title: Learning the foundation
timeline.description: Started from core web technologies and built a strong base with HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Git, and responsive layout patterns.

timeline.title: Building real projects
timeline.description: Explored frontend and backend workflows by creating portfolio pages, dashboard interfaces, authentication flows, and database-driven applications.

timeline.title: Growing as a fullstack developer
timeline.description: Currently improving with React, Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js, MySQL, Tailwind CSS, and deployment workflows for production-ready projects.

AboutPage.whatIBuildDescription: I focus on modern portfolio sites, internal dashboards, CRUD applications, and fullstack web systems that combine clear interfaces with maintainable application logic.
